chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1144 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.4639/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 10.09.2025 Mr. Gulshan Ahmed Shujrah, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General ************** Counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant Constitution Petition on the ground that the petitioner, being a civil servant, intends to approach the Sindh Service Tribunal for appropriate relief. In view of the above circumstances, the present Constitution Petition stands disposed of along with the pending application. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
